body:
🤖 Beep boop. I am GabrieleBOT. 🤖

I received an update so that I can inform you directly of the changes (but feel free to check the [release notes](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaModules/blob/main/NEWS.md)).

The most recent version of climacommon uses the newly released Julia 1.11.4.

This version is needed to use CUDA 5.7, so I would recommend updating.
title: Update climacommon to 2025_03_18

body:
Revert "infrastructure for adding boundary flux contributions to jacobian for soil ([#1011](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaLand.jl/issues/1011))"

This reverts commit aa053c08cfe9fbe2cb937c2947b0ae3f12d87a04.

For 9000 steps, the SYPD is 14.906 (main branch, [buildkite](https://buildkite.com/clima/climaland-long-runs/builds/3841#0195ab45-a79a-4f86-ab56-1471bc043ff8)) and 19.211 (this PR, [buildkite](https://buildkite.com/clima/climaland-long-runs/builds/3840#0195ab44-b312-43d1-a46f-c30a60c0bf18)).
title: Revert "infrastructure for adding boundary flux contributions to jacobian for soil"
